scene_title_jp: 魔法使いは可愛くてモテるから
scene_title_vi: Pháp Sư Dễ Thương Nên Được Yêu Thích
notes: Iola (イオラ) female magic student from Perdion Magic Academy. Uses あたし/あんた casual feminine speech, calls Commander 先生 (Teacher)→'Thầy'. Commander addresses Iola as 'em' (student), self-refers as 'tôi'/'thầy'. Scene has H18-adjacent banter (porno mag reference, flashbang comedy)—translated directly per project-wide adult confirmation. EN-asset-is-English mode: translated JP→VI via ja.json meaning, EN asset used as structural authority.
